headlines.description: Mbappe scores brace as France make statement in 3-1 win over Senegal
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe scores brace as France make statement in 3-1 win over Senegal

headlines.description: Erling Haaland scored his first World Cup goals with a brace as Norway started their campaign with a 4-1 win over Iraq in Boston.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets brace on WC debut, Norway beat Iraq

headlines.description: Lionel Messi equalled Miroslav Klose's record of 16 World Cup goals with a hat-trick as Argentina began their title defence with a 3-0 win over Algeria in Kansas City.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi nets record hat trick in 3-0 win over Algeria

headlines.description: Austria won a World Cup game for the first time in 36 years with a 3-1 victory Tuesday over a Jordan team making their debut at the global showpiece.
headlines.shortLinkText: Austria get first WC win in 36 years against Jordan
